college.name: Geethanjali College of Engineering and Technology

director.name: Dr. Udaya Kumar Susarla
director.description: A distinguished academician with extensive experience in engineering education across India, New Zealand, Ethiopia, and Morocco, and former Principal of the college.

chairman.name: Mr. G. R. Ravinder Reddy
chairman.description: Secretary of the Geethanjali Group of Institutions, an alumnus of NIT Warangal in Civil Engineering, and a former Superintendent of Police.

vice_chairman.name: Mr. G. Harishchandra Reddy
vice_chairman.description: Vice Chairman of the Geethanjali Group of Institutions who actively oversees the administration, operational management, and development of the campus.

hod.name: Dr. E. Ravindra
hod.description: Head of the Computer Science and Engineering department, coordinating academic curricula, faculty development, and student placement initiatives.

club.name: GCET Robotics Club
club.description: A prominent hub for automation, robotics, and AI at GCET. The club operates out of a dedicated Robotics Lab, facilitates projects ranging from drones to autonomous bots, and hosts ROBOTICA, a major national tech festival.

2024.summary: An excellent placement season securing high percentage recruitments across engineering streams.

2025.summary: A highly competitive placement season with a large volume of multi-industry employment offers.
